certificate_id.description: Unique ID for identifying the SSL certificate in GCP resources

creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the SSL certificate was created

expire_time.description: Date and time when the SSL certificate will expire

id.description: Resource ID for referencing the managed SSL certificate

self_link.description: URL for accessing the SSL certificate resource in GCP

subject_alternative_names.description: List of domains covered by the managed SSL certificate
